metadata.significance: Known as 'Bride of the Quran', repeatedly asks 'Which favors will you deny?'

translations.en_sahih: The Most Merciful
translations.en_yusufali: (Allah) Most Gracious!
translations.ms_basmeih: (Tuhan) Yang Maha Pemurah serta melimpah-limpah rahmatNya.

translations.en_sahih: Taught the Qur'an,
translations.en_yusufali: It is He Who has taught the Qur'an.
translations.ms_basmeih: Dia lah yang telah mengajarkan Al-Quran.

translations.en_sahih: Created man,
translations.en_yusufali: He has created man:
translations.ms_basmeih: Dia lah yang telah menciptakan manusia; -

translations.en_sahih: [And] taught him eloquence.
translations.en_yusufali: He has taught him speech (and intelligence).
translations.ms_basmeih: Dia lah yang telah membolehkan manusia (bertutur) memberi dan menerima kenyataan.

translations.en_sahih: The sun and the moon [move] by precise calculation,
translations.en_yusufali: The sun and the moon follow courses (exactly) computed;
translations.ms_basmeih: Matahari dan bulan beredar dengan peraturan dan hitungan yang tertentu;

translations.en_sahih: And the stars and trees prostrate.
translations.en_yusufali: And the herbs and the trees - both (alike) prostrate in adoration.
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan tumbuh-tumbuhan yang melata serta pohon-pohon kayu-kayan, masing-masing tunduk menurut peraturanNya.

translations.en_sahih: And the heaven He raised and imposed the balance
translations.en_yusufali: And the Firmament has He raised high, and He has set up the Balance (of Justice),
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan langit dijadikannya (bumbung) tinggi, serta Ia mengadakan undang-undang dan peraturan neraca keadilan,

translations.en_sahih: That you not transgress within the balance.
translations.en_yusufali: In order that ye may not transgress (due) balance.
translations.ms_basmeih: Supaya kamu tidak melampaui batas dalam menjalankan keadilan;

ayahs.arabic: وَأَقِيمُوا۟ ٱلْوَزْنَ بِٱلْقِسْطِ وَلَا تُخْسِرُوا۟ ٱلْمِيزَانَ
ayahs.transliteration: Waaqeemoo alwazna bialqisti wala tukhsiroo almeezana

translations.en_sahih: And establish weight in justice and do not make deficient the balance.
translations.en_yusufali: So establish weight with justice and fall not short in the balance.
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan betulkanlah cara menimbang itu dengan adil, serta janganlah kamu mengurangi barang yang ditimbang.

translations.en_sahih: And the earth He laid [out] for the creatures.
translations.en_yusufali: It is He Who has spread out the earth for (His) creatures:
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan bumi pula dijadikannya rata untuk kegunaan manusia dan makhluk-makhlukNya yang lain:

translations.en_sahih: Therein is fruit and palm trees having sheaths [of dates]
translations.en_yusufali: Therein is fruit and date-palms, producing spathes (enclosing dates);
translations.ms_basmeih: Terdapat padanya berbagai jenis buah-buahan dan pohon-pohon kurma yang ada kelopak-kelopak mayang;

translations.en_sahih: And grain having husks and scented plants.
translations.en_yusufali: Also corn, with (its) leaves and stalk for fodder, and sweet-smelling plants.
translations.ms_basmeih: Demikian juga terdapat biji-bijian yang ada jerami serta daun, dan terdapat lagi bunga-bungaan yang harum;

translations.en_sahih: So which of the favors of your Lord would you deny?
translations.en_yusufali: Then which of the favours of your Lord will ye deny?
translations.ms_basmeih: Maka yang mana satu di antara nikmat-nikmat Tuhan kamu, yang kamu hendak dustakan (wahai umat manusia dan jin)?

translations.en_sahih: He created man from clay like [that of] pottery.
translations.en_yusufali: He created man from sounding clay like unto pottery,
translations.ms_basmeih: Ia menciptakan manusia (lembaga Adam) dari tanah liat kering seperti tembikar,

ayahs.arabic: وَخَلَقَ ٱلْجَآنَّ مِن مَّارِجٍ مِّن نَّارٍ
ayahs.transliteration: Wakhalaqa aljanna min marijin min narin

translations.en_sahih: And He created the jinn from a smokeless flame of fire.
translations.en_yusufali: And He created Jinns from fire free of smoke:
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan Ia telah menciptakan jin dari lidah api yang menjulang-julang;

translations.en_sahih: So which of the favors of your Lord would you deny?
translations.en_yusufali: Then which of the favours of your Lord will ye deny?
translations.ms_basmeih: Maka yang mana satu di antara nikmat-nikmat Tuhan kamu, yang kamu hendak dustakan?

translations.en_sahih: [He is] Lord of the two sunrises and Lord of the two sunsets.
translations.en_yusufali: (He is) Lord of the two Easts and Lord of the two Wests:
translations.ms_basmeih: (Dia lah) Tuhan yang mentadbirkan dua timur, dan Tuhan yang mentadbirkan dua barat.

translations.en_sahih: So which of the favors of your Lord would you deny?
translations.en_yusufali: Then which of the favours of your Lord will ye deny?
translations.ms_basmeih: Maka yang mana satu di antara nikmat-nikmat Tuhan kamu, yang kamu hendak dustakan?

translations.en_sahih: He released the two seas, meeting [side by side];
translations.en_yusufali: He has let free the two bodies of flowing water, meeting together:
translations.ms_basmeih: Ia biarkan air dua laut (yang masin dan yang tawar) mengalir, sedang keduanya pula bertemu;

translations.en_sahih: Between them is a barrier [so] neither of them transgresses.
translations.en_yusufali: Between them is a Barrier which they do not transgress:
translations.ms_basmeih: Di antara keduanya ada penyekat yang memisahkannya, masing-masing tidak melampaui sempadannya;

translations.en_sahih: So which of the favors of your Lord would you deny?
translations.en_yusufali: Then which of the favours of your Lord will ye deny?
translations.ms_basmeih: Maka yang mana satu di antara nikmat-nikmat Tuhan kamu, yang kamu hendak dustakan?

translations.en_sahih: From both of them emerge pearl and coral.
translations.en_yusufali: Out of them come Pearls and Coral:
translations.ms_basmeih: Dari kedua laut itu, keluar mutiara dan marjan;

translations.en_sahih: So which of the favors of your Lord would you deny?
translations.en_yusufali: Then which of the favours of your Lord will ye deny?
translations.ms_basmeih: Maka yang mana satu di antara nikmat-nikmat Tuhan kamu, yang kamu hendak dustakan?

ayahs.arabic: وَلَهُ ٱلْجَوَارِ ٱلْمُنشَـَٔاتُ فِى ٱلْبَحْرِ كَٱلْأَعْلَـٰمِ
ayahs.transliteration: Walahu aljawari almunshaatu fee albahri kaalaAAlami

translations.en_sahih: And to Him belong the ships [with sails] elevated in the sea like mountains.
translations.en_yusufali: And His are the Ships sailing smoothly through the seas, lofty as mountains:
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan Dia lah yang menguasai kapal-kapal yang belayar di laut, yang kembang tinggi layarnya seperti gunung-ganang;

translations.en_sahih: So which of the favors of your Lord would you deny?
translations.en_yusufali: Then which of the favours of your Lord will ye deny?
translations.ms_basmeih: Maka yang mana satu di antara nikmat-nikmat Tuhan kamu, yang kamu hendak dustakan?

translations.en_sahih: Everyone upon the earth will perish,
translations.en_yusufali: All that is on earth will perish:
translations.ms_basmeih: Segala yang ada di muka bumi itu akan binasa:

ayahs.arabic: وَيَبْقَىٰ وَجْهُ رَبِّكَ ذُو ٱلْجَلَـٰلِ وَٱلْإِكْرَامِ
ayahs.transliteration: Wayabqa wajhu rabbika thoo aljalali waalikrami

translations.en_sahih: And there will remain the Face of your Lord, Owner of Majesty and Honor.
translations.en_yusufali: But will abide (for ever) the Face of thy Lord,- full of Majesty, Bounty and Honour.
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan akan kekalah Zat Tuhanmu yang mempunyai Kebesaran dan Kemuliaan:

translations.en_sahih: So which of the favors of your Lord would you deny?
translations.en_yusufali: Then which of the favours of your Lord will ye deny?
translations.ms_basmeih: Maka yang mana satu di antara nikmat-nikmat Tuhan kamu, yang kamu hendak dustakan?

ayahs.arabic: يَسْـَٔلُهُۥ مَن فِى ٱلسَّمَـٰوَٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضِ ۚ كُلَّ يَوْمٍ هُوَ فِى شَأْنٍ
ayahs.transliteration: Yasaluhu man fee alssamawati waalardi kulla yawmin huwa fee shanin

translations.en_sahih: Whoever is within the heavens and earth asks Him; every day He is bringing about a matter.
translations.en_yusufali: Of Him seeks (its need) every creature in the heavens and on earth: every day in (new) Splendour doth He (shine)!
translations.ms_basmeih: Sekalian makhluk yang ada di langit dan di bumi sentiasa berhajat dan memohon kepadaNya. Tiap-tiap masa Ia di dalam urusan (mencipta dan mentadbirkan makhluk-makhlukNya)!

translations.en_sahih: So which of the favors of your Lord would you deny?
translations.en_yusufali: Then which of the favours of your Lord will ye deny?
translations.ms_basmeih: Maka yang mana satu di antara nikmat-nikmat Tuhan kamu, yang kamu hendak dustakan)?

translations.en_sahih: We will attend to you, O prominent beings.
translations.en_yusufali: Soon shall We settle your affairs, O both ye worlds!
translations.ms_basmeih: Kami hanya akan menguruskan hitungan dan balasan amal kamu sahaja (pada hari kiamat,) wahai manusia dan jin!

translations.en_sahih: So which of the favors of your Lord would you deny?
translations.en_yusufali: Then which of the favours of your Lord will ye deny?
translations.ms_basmeih: Maka yang mana satu di antara nikmat-nikmat Tuhan kamu, yang kamu hendak dustakan?

ayahs.arabic: يَـٰمَعْشَرَ ٱلْجِنِّ وَٱلْإِنسِ إِنِ ٱسْتَطَعْتُمْ أَن تَنفُذُوا۟ مِنْ أَقْطَارِ ٱلسَّمَـٰوَٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضِ فَٱنفُذُوا۟ ۚ لَا تَنفُذُونَ إِلَّا بِسُلْطَـٰنٍ
ayahs.transliteration: Ya maAAshara aljinni waalinsi ini istataAAtum an tanfuthoo min aqtari alssamawati waalardi faonfuthoo la tanfuthoona illa bisultanin

translations.en_sahih: O company of jinn and mankind, if you are able to pass beyond the regions of the heavens and the earth, then pass. You will not pass except by authority [from Allah].
translations.en_yusufali: O ye assembly of Jinns and men! If it be ye can pass beyond the zones of the heavens and the earth, pass ye! not without authority shall ye be able to pass!
translations.ms_basmeih: Wahai sekalian jin dan manusia! Kalau kamu dapat menembus keluar dari kawasan-kawasan langit dan bumi (untuk melarikan diri dari kekuasaan dan balasan Kami), maka cubalah kamu menembus keluar. Kamu tidak akan menembus keluar melainkan dengan satu kekuasaan (yang mengatasi kekuasaan Kami; masakan dapat)!

translations.en_sahih: So which of the favors of your Lord would you deny?
translations.en_yusufali: Then which of the favours of your Lord will ye deny?
translations.ms_basmeih: Maka yang mana satu di antara nikmat-nikmat Tuhan kamu, yang kamu hendak dustakan?

ayahs.arabic: يُرْسَلُ عَلَيْكُمَا شُوَاظٌ مِّن نَّارٍ وَنُحَاسٌ فَلَا تَنتَصِرَانِ
ayahs.transliteration: Yursalu AAalaykuma shuwathun min narin wanuhasun fala tantasirani

translations.en_sahih: There will be sent upon you a flame of fire and smoke, and you will not defend yourselves.
translations.en_yusufali: On you will be sent (O ye evil ones twain!) a flame of fire (to burn) and a smoke (to choke): no defence will ye have:
translations.ms_basmeih: Kamu (wahai golongan yang kufur ingkar dari kalangan jin dan manusia) akan ditimpakan dengan api yang menjulang-julang dan leburan tembaga cair (yang membakar); dengan yang demikian, kamu tidak akan dapat mempertahankan diri (dari azab seksa itu);

translations.en_sahih: So which of the favors of your Lord would you deny?
translations.en_yusufali: Then which of the favours of your Lord will ye deny?
translations.ms_basmeih: Maka yang mana satu di antara nikmat-nikmat Tuhan kamu, yang kamu hendak dustakan?

ayahs.arabic: فَإِذَا ٱنشَقَّتِ ٱلسَّمَآءُ فَكَانَتْ وَرْدَةً كَٱلدِّهَانِ
ayahs.transliteration: Faitha inshaqqati alssamao fakanat wardatan kaalddihani

translations.en_sahih: And when the heaven is split open and becomes rose-colored like oil -
translations.en_yusufali: When the sky is rent asunder, and it becomes red like ointment:
translations.ms_basmeih: Selain itu (sungguh ngeri) ketika langit pecah-belah lalu menjadilah ia merah mawar, berkilat seperti minyak;

translations.en_sahih: So which of the favors of your Lord would you deny? -
translations.en_yusufali: Then which of the favours of your Lord will ye deny?
translations.ms_basmeih: Maka yang mana satu di antara nikmat-nikmat Tuhan kamu, yang kamu hendak dustakan?

ayahs.arabic: فَيَوْمَئِذٍ لَّا يُسْـَٔلُ عَن ذَنۢبِهِۦٓ إِنسٌ وَلَا جَآنٌّ
ayahs.transliteration: Fayawmaithin la yusalu AAan thanbihi insun wala jannun

translations.en_sahih: Then on that Day none will be asked about his sin among men or jinn.
translations.en_yusufali: On that Day no question will be asked of man or Jinn as to his sin.
translations.ms_basmeih: Pada masa itu tiada sesiapapun, sama ada manusia atau jin, yang akan ditanya tentang dosanya (kerana masing-masing dapat dikenal menurut keadaannya);

translations.en_sahih: So which of the favors of your Lord would you deny?
translations.en_yusufali: Then which of the favours of your Lord will ye deny?
translations.ms_basmeih: Maka yang mana satu di antara nikmat-nikmat Tuhan kamu, yang kamu hendak dustakan?

ayahs.arabic: يُعْرَفُ ٱلْمُجْرِمُونَ بِسِيمَـٰهُمْ فَيُؤْخَذُ بِٱلنَّوَٰصِى وَٱلْأَقْدَامِ
ayahs.transliteration: YuAArafu almujrimoona biseemahum fayukhathu bialnnawasee waalaqdami

translations.en_sahih: The criminals will be known by their marks, and they will be seized by the forelocks and the feet.
translations.en_yusufali: (For) the sinners will be known by their marks: and they will be seized by their forelocks and their feet.
translations.ms_basmeih: Orang-orang yang berdosa dapat dikenal dari tanda-tandanya, lalu dipegang dari atas kepala dan kakinya (serta diseret ke neraka);

translations.en_sahih: So which of the favors of your Lord would you deny?
translations.en_yusufali: Then which of the favours of your Lord will ye deny?
translations.ms_basmeih: Maka yang mana satu di antara nikmat-nikmat Tuhan kamu, yang kamu hendak dustakan?

ayahs.arabic: هَـٰذِهِۦ جَهَنَّمُ ٱلَّتِى يُكَذِّبُ بِهَا ٱلْمُجْرِمُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Hathihi jahannamu allatee yukaththibu biha almujrimoona

translations.en_sahih: This is Hell, which the criminals deny.
translations.en_yusufali: This is the Hell which the Sinners deny:
translations.ms_basmeih: (Lalu dikatakan kepada mereka): "Inilah neraka Jahannam yang selalu orang-orang yang berdosa mendustakannya ".

translations.en_sahih: They will go around between it and scalding water, heated [to the utmost degree].
translations.en_yusufali: In its midst and in the midst of boiling hot water will they wander round!
translations.ms_basmeih: Mereka (terus diseksa) berulang-ulang di antara api neraka dengan air yang menggelegak yang cukup masak panasnya!

translations.en_sahih: So which of the favors of your Lord would you deny?
translations.en_yusufali: Then which of the favours of your Lord will ye deny?
translations.ms_basmeih: Maka yang mana satu di antara nikmat-nikmat Tuhan kamu, yang kamu hendak dustakan?

translations.en_sahih: But for he who has feared the position of his Lord are two gardens -
translations.en_yusufali: But for such as fear the time when they will stand before (the Judgment Seat of) their Lord, there will be two Gardens-
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan orang yang takut akan keadaan dirinya di mahkamah Tuhannya (untuk dihitung amalnya), disediakan baginya dua Syurga, -

translations.en_sahih: So which of the favors of your Lord would you deny? -
translations.en_yusufali: Then which of the favours of your Lord will ye deny?-
translations.ms_basmeih: Maka yang mana satu di antara nikmat-nikmat Tuhan kamu, yang kamu hendak dustakan?

translations.en_sahih: Having [spreading] branches.
translations.en_yusufali: Containing all kinds (of trees and delights);-
translations.ms_basmeih: (Dua Syurga) yang ada berjenis-jenis pohon dan buah-buahan; -

translations.en_sahih: So which of the favors of your Lord would you deny?
translations.en_yusufali: Then which of the favours of your Lord will ye deny?-
translations.ms_basmeih: Maka yang mana satu di antara nikmat-nikmat Tuhan kamu, yang kamu hendak dustakan?

translations.en_sahih: In both of them are two springs, flowing.
translations.en_yusufali: In them (each) will be two Springs flowing (free);
translations.ms_basmeih: Pada kedua-dua Syurga itu terdapat dua matair yang mengalir; -

translations.en_sahih: So which of the favors of your Lord would you deny?
translations.en_yusufali: Then which of the favours of your Lord will ye deny?-
translations.ms_basmeih: Maka yang mana satu di antara nikmat-nikmat Tuhan kamu, yang kamu hendak dustakan.

translations.en_sahih: In both of them are of every fruit, two kinds.
translations.en_yusufali: In them will be Fruits of every kind, two and two.
translations.ms_basmeih: Pada kedua Syurga itu terdapat dua macam dari tiap-tiap jenis buah-buahan (yang biasa dan yang luar biasa).

translations.en_sahih: So which of the favors of your Lord would you deny?
translations.en_yusufali: Then which of the favours of your Lord will ye deny?
translations.ms_basmeih: Maka yang mana satu di antara nikmat-nikmat Tuhan kamu, yang kamu hendak dustakan?

ayahs.arabic: مُتَّكِـِٔينَ عَلَىٰ فُرُشٍۭ بَطَآئِنُهَا مِنْ إِسْتَبْرَقٍ ۚ وَجَنَى ٱلْجَنَّتَيْنِ دَانٍ
ayahs.transliteration: Muttakieena AAala furushin batainuha min istabraqin wajana aljannatayni danin

translations.en_sahih: [They are] reclining on beds whose linings are of silk brocade, and the fruit of the two gardens is hanging low.
translations.en_yusufali: They will recline on Carpets, whose inner linings will be of rich brocade: the Fruit of the Gardens will be near (and easy of reach).
translations.ms_basmeih: Mereka (bersenang-senang di tempat masing-masing dalam Syurga itu dengan) berbaring di atas hamparan-hamparan, yang lapisan-lapisan sebelah dalamnya - dari sutera tebal yang bersulam; dan buah-buahan kedua-dua Syurga itu dekat (kepada mereka) untuk dipetik.

translations.en_sahih: So which of the favors of your Lord would you deny?
translations.en_yusufali: Then which of the favours of your Lord will ye deny?
translations.ms_basmeih: Maka yang mana satu di antara nikmat-nikmat Tuhan kamu, yang kamu hendak dustakan?

ayahs.arabic: فِيهِنَّ قَـٰصِرَٰتُ ٱلطَّرْفِ لَمْ يَطْمِثْهُنَّ إِنسٌ قَبْلَهُمْ وَلَا جَآنٌّ
ayahs.transliteration: Feehinna qasiratu alttarfi lam yatmithhunna insun qablahum wala jannun

translations.en_sahih: In them are women limiting [their] glances, untouched before them by man or jinni -
translations.en_yusufali: In them will be (Maidens), chaste, restraining their glances, whom no man or Jinn before them has touched;-
translations.ms_basmeih: Di dalam Syurga-syurga itu terdapat bidadari-bidadari yang pandangannya tertumpu (kepada mereka semata-mata), yang tidak pernah disentuh sebelum mereka oleh manusia dan jin;

translations.en_sahih: So which of the favors of your Lord would you deny? -
translations.en_yusufali: Then which of the favours of your Lord will ye deny?-
translations.ms_basmeih: Maka yang mana satu di antara nikmat-nikmat Tuhan kamu, yang kamu hendak dustakan?

translations.en_sahih: As if they were rubies and coral.
translations.en_yusufali: Like unto Rubies and coral.
translations.ms_basmeih: Bidadari-bidadari itu (cantik berseri) seperti permata delima dan marjan.

translations.en_sahih: So which of the favors of your Lord would you deny?
translations.en_yusufali: Then which of the favours of your Lord will ye deny?
translations.ms_basmeih: Maka yang mana satu di antara nikmat-nikmat Tuhan kamu, yang kamu hendak dustakan?

translations.en_sahih: Is the reward for good [anything] but good?
translations.en_yusufali: Is there any Reward for Good - other than Good?
translations.ms_basmeih: Bukankah tidak ada balasan bagi amal yang baik - melainkan balasan yang baik juga?

translations.en_sahih: So which of the favors of your Lord would you deny?
translations.en_yusufali: Then which of the favours of your Lord will ye deny?
translations.ms_basmeih: Maka yang mana satu di antara nikmat-nikmat Tuhan kamu, yang kamu hendak dustakan?

translations.en_sahih: And below them both [in excellence] are two [other] gardens -
translations.en_yusufali: And besides these two, there are two other Gardens,-
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan selain dari dua Syurga itu, dua Syurga lagi (untuk menjadi balasan bagi golongan peringkat yang kedua);

translations.en_sahih: So which of the favors of your Lord would you deny? -
translations.en_yusufali: Then which of the favours of your Lord will ye deny?-
translations.ms_basmeih: Maka yang mana satu di antara nikmat-nikmat Tuhan kamu, yang kamu hendak dustakan?

translations.en_sahih: Dark green [in color].
translations.en_yusufali: Dark-green in colour (from plentiful watering).
translations.ms_basmeih: Kedua-duanya menghijau subur tanamannya;

translations.en_sahih: So which of the favors of your Lord would you deny?
translations.en_yusufali: Then which of the favours of your Lord will ye deny?
translations.ms_basmeih: Maka yang mana satu di antara nikmat-nikmat Tuhan kamu, yang kamu hendak dustakan?

translations.en_sahih: In both of them are two springs, spouting.
translations.en_yusufali: In them (each) will be two Springs pouring forth water in continuous abundance:
translations.ms_basmeih: Dalam kedua-dua Syurga itu terdapat dua matair yang terus menerus memancutkan airnya:

translations.en_sahih: So which of the favors of your Lord would you deny?
translations.en_yusufali: Then which of the favours of your Lord will ye deny?
translations.ms_basmeih: Maka yang mana satu di antara nikmat-nikmat Tuhan kamu, yang kamu hendak dustakan?

translations.en_sahih: In both of them are fruit and palm trees and pomegranates.
translations.en_yusufali: In them will be Fruits, and dates and pomegranates:
translations.ms_basmeih: Pada keduanya juga terdapat buah-buahan, serta pohon-pohon kurma dan delima,

translations.en_sahih: So which of the favors of your Lord would you deny?
translations.en_yusufali: Then which of the favours of your Lord will ye deny?
translations.ms_basmeih: Maka yang mana satu di antara nikmat-nikmat Tuhan kamu, yang kamu hendak dustakan?

translations.en_sahih: In them are good and beautiful women -
translations.en_yusufali: In them will be fair (Companions), good, beautiful;-
translations.ms_basmeih: Dalam kedua-dua Syurga itu juga terdapat (teman-teman) yang baik akhlaknya, lagi cantik parasnya;

translations.en_sahih: So which of the favors of your Lord would you deny? -
translations.en_yusufali: Then which of the favours of your Lord will ye deny?-
translations.ms_basmeih: Maka yang mana satu di antara nikmat-nikmat tuhan kamu, yang kamu hendak dustakan?

translations.en_sahih: Fair ones reserved in pavilions -
translations.en_yusufali: Companions restrained (as to their glances), in (goodly) pavilions;-
translations.ms_basmeih: Ia itu bidadari-bidadari, yang hanya tinggal tetap di tempat tinggal masing-masing;

translations.en_sahih: So which of the favors of your Lord would you deny? -
translations.en_yusufali: Then which of the favours of your Lord will ye deny?-
translations.ms_basmeih: Maka yang mana satu di antara nikmat-nikmat Tuhan kamu, yang kamu hendak dustakan?

ayahs.arabic: لَمْ يَطْمِثْهُنَّ إِنسٌ قَبْلَهُمْ وَلَا جَآنٌّ
ayahs.transliteration: Lam yatmithhunna insun qablahum wala jannun

translations.en_sahih: Untouched before them by man or jinni -
translations.en_yusufali: Whom no man or Jinn before them has touched;-
translations.ms_basmeih: (Bidadari-bidadari itu) tidak pernah disentuh sebelum mereka oleh manusia dan tidak juga oleh jin;

translations.en_sahih: So which of the favors of your Lord would you deny? -
translations.en_yusufali: Then which of the favours of your Lord will ye deny?-
translations.ms_basmeih: Maka yang mana satu di antara nikmat-nikmat Tuhan kamu, yang kamu hendak dustakan?

ayahs.arabic: مُتَّكِـِٔينَ عَلَىٰ رَفْرَفٍ خُضْرٍ وَعَبْقَرِىٍّ حِسَانٍ
ayahs.transliteration: Muttakieena AAala rafrafin khudrin waAAabqariyyin hisanin

translations.en_sahih: Reclining on green cushions and beautiful fine carpets.
translations.en_yusufali: Reclining on green Cushions and rich Carpets of beauty.
translations.ms_basmeih: Penduduk Syurga itu (bersenang-senang di dalamnya dengan) berbaring di atas (bantal-bantal dan) cadar-cadar yang hijau warnanya serta permaidani-permaidani yang sangat indah.

translations.en_sahih: So which of the favors of your Lord would you deny?
translations.en_yusufali: Then which of the favours of your Lord will ye deny?
translations.ms_basmeih: Maka yang mana satu di antara nikmat-nikmat Tuhan kamu, yang kamu hendak dustakan?

ayahs.arabic: تَبَـٰرَكَ ٱسْمُ رَبِّكَ ذِى ٱلْجَلَـٰلِ وَٱلْإِكْرَامِ
ayahs.transliteration: Tabaraka ismu rabbika thee aljalali waalikrami

translations.en_sahih: Blessed is the name of your Lord, Owner of Majesty and Honor.
translations.en_yusufali: Blessed be the name of thy Lord, full of Majesty, Bounty and Honour.
translations.ms_basmeih: Maha Sucilah nama Tuhanmu yang mempunyai Kebesaran dan Kemuliaan.
